title: House Of Cards
relevance_summary: Recursive minting and borrowing loop between stablecoins

prevention.rule: Block any tx that mints stablecoin A after borrowing against stablecoin B in the same transaction

red_flags: Institutional-grade returns with retail chasing 95% APY
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that mints stablecoin A after borrowing against stablecoin B in the same transaction
summary: Stream Finance and Elixir Network created a recursive minting and borrowing loop between their stablecoins, allowing the attacker to mint millions of dollars worth of stablecoins through arbitrage. A guard could have detected and blocked such transactions by monitoring for stablecoin minting immediately following a stablecoin borrow.
